    |  Dashboard  |

+----------oosuccess---+

|           |          |

|  |  Authenticate  |  |
|  +----------------+  |
|           ^          |
|        submit        |
|           |          |

|   |  Login Form  |   |

+[  Auth Flow  ]-------+
